blended.narrative: Vail is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,728 ft. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 24".
